role: Contains execution checkpoint records for the ArchSpine sync pipeline.
responsibility: Tracks the lifecycle of sync command runs from initiation to completion, recording per-stage timestamps and item-level completion status, enabling reliable resumption of interrupted runs and providing an authoritative audit trail.

children.role: This JSON file is an execution checkpoint record for the ArchSpine sync pipeline. It logs the initiation, progress, and final state of a sync command run, including per-stage timestamps and item-level completion status. It is not a configuration file that alters system behavior; rather, it serves as an authoritative trace for resumption, debugging, and audit of a specific sync operation.
